title: App - make "Unread" as default in Notifications section
excerpt: In the mobile app, the “Notifications” button now opens the view of all Notifications, and then a click on the “Unread” label is necessary to filter only the more important unread notifications. Could you make the “Unrea…

posts.author: mbadi (Michele)
posts.cookedHtml: In the mobile app, the “Notifications” button now opens the view of all Notifications, and then a click on the “Unread” label is necessary to filter only the more important unread notifications. Could you make the “Unread” as default view, like the desktop app?
